untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern detection requires visual pattern recognition (identifying highest high, lowest low, and width/narrowness assessment within a multi-bar formation). This cannot be expressed using only point-in-time technical indicators. Height ratio calculation (high-low)/breakout_price and comparative analysis (tall vs short, narrow vs wide) require pattern state tracking not available in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires diamond chart pattern identification with morphological analysis. The allowed indicators cannot detect or measure diamond formations. Provided placeholder conditions using pivot points and moving average crossovers as a generic diamond breakout proxy, but this does not capture the core signal logic of height and width ratios. Author reports 69% success rate for bear market breakdowns and 17% average decline. Recommend implementing custom pattern detection or requesting pattern-specific indicators.
